title: Uruguayan Chicken Wrap
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make wrap filled with Uruguayan-style chicken, served in a fluffy wrap.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the chicken breasts with Uruguayan seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before slicing.
In a pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chopped cilantro and cook for an additional minute.
Warm the fluffy tortilla wrap in the microwave or by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the sour cream on the tortilla, followed by the sliced chicken, cooked onion mixture, and shredded cheese.
